title: Lucid Group (LCID) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy?
text: Lucid Group was expected to beat earnings estimates for Q1 2024. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the to-be-reported quarter's loss per share and revenues was pegged at 25 cents and $173.09 million, respectively. Lucid had an Earnings ESP of -8.00%, suggesting the company was expected to miss estimates. Additionally, LCID missed earnings estimates in each of the trailing four quarters. The earnings report marked a critical juncture for investor sentiment on the EV company. Production ramp and delivery growth were identified as key metrics to watch.
